{{Quote|Singing her way into your heart—and other vital organs—direct from a triumphant engagement on Seezars Planet…The Chanteuse of the Stars!|Kabray Station attendant|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 77">[[Star Wars (1977) 77|''Star Wars'' (1977) 77]]</ref>}}
'''Seezar's Planet''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] where the "[[Chanteuse of the Stars/Legends|Chanteuse of the Stars]]," [[Shirley]], once performed.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 77|''Star Wars'' (1977) 77]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 77}} {{1stm}}
